learningObjectives.title: Order integers, decimals and fractions
learningObjectives.description: Order positive and negative integers, decimals and fractions; use the symbols =, ≠, <, >, ≤, ≥

learningObjectives.title: Four operations with integers
learningObjectives.description: Apply the four operations to integers, decimals and fractions (positive and negative)

learningObjectives.title: Powers and roots
learningObjectives.description: Use powers and roots; know the laws of indices for positive integer exponents

learningObjectives.title: Prime factorisation
learningObjectives.description: Use prime factor decomposition, HCF and LCM including product of primes

learningObjectives.title: Fraction operations
learningObjectives.description: Add, subtract, multiply and divide fractions; convert between mixed numbers and improper fractions

learningObjectives.title: Decimal and percentage equivalence
learningObjectives.description: Convert between fractions, decimals and percentages; recurring decimals (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Percentage change
learningObjectives.description: Calculate percentage increase and decrease; reverse percentages

learningObjectives.title: Standard form
learningObjectives.description: Use standard form for very large and very small numbers; calculate with values in standard form

learningObjectives.title: Rounding and estimation
learningObjectives.description: Round to a given number of decimal places or significant figures; estimate answers

learningObjectives.title: Bounds and error intervals
learningObjectives.description: Apply limits of accuracy; upper and lower bounds (Higher emphasis)

learningObjectives.title: Algebraic notation
learningObjectives.description: Use and interpret algebraic notation including ab, 3y, a², a³, a/b

learningObjectives.title: Simplify expressions
learningObjectives.description: Substitute values; simplify and manipulate algebraic expressions including expanding products

learningObjectives.title: Factorise expressions
learningObjectives.description: Factorise linear expressions; factorise quadratic expressions (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Algebraic fractions
learningObjectives.description: Simplify and manipulate algebraic fractions (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Plot and interpret graphs
learningObjectives.description: Plot graphs of linear, quadratic and reciprocal relationships; interpret gradients and intercepts

learningObjectives.title: Equation of a line
learningObjectives.description: Find the equation of a straight line in the form y = mx + c

learningObjectives.title: Non-linear graphs
learningObjectives.description: Recognise and sketch graphs of quadratic, cubic and reciprocal functions (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Linear equations
learningObjectives.description: Solve linear equations in one unknown; equations with unknowns on both sides

learningObjectives.title: Quadratic equations
learningObjectives.description: Solve quadratic equations by factorising, completing the square or formula (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Simultaneous equations
learningObjectives.description: Solve simultaneous equations in two variables (linear and quadratic on Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Inequalities
learningObjectives.description: Solve linear inequalities; represent solutions on a number line

learningObjectives.title: Generate sequences
learningObjectives.description: Generate terms of a sequence from a term-to-term or position-to-term rule

learningObjectives.title: nth term
learningObjectives.description: Deduce expressions for the nth term of linear sequences; quadratic nth term (Higher)

units.title: Ratio, proportion and rates of change

learningObjectives.title: Simplify and divide ratios
learningObjectives.description: Simplify ratio notation; divide a quantity in a given ratio

learningObjectives.title: Direct and inverse proportion
learningObjectives.description: Solve problems involving direct and inverse proportion

learningObjectives.title: Compound measures
learningObjectives.description: Use compound units such as speed, density and pressure

learningObjectives.title: Gradient as rate of change
learningObjectives.description: Interpret the gradient of a straight line graph as a rate of change

learningObjectives.title: Instantaneous rate of change
learningObjectives.description: Estimate gradients of curves and areas under graphs (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Angle facts
learningObjectives.description: Apply angle facts at a point, on a line, in triangles and quadrilaterals

learningObjectives.title: Circle theorems
learningObjectives.description: Apply circle theorems (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Constructions and loci
learningObjectives.description: Construct perpendicular bisectors, angles and loci

learningObjectives.title: Area and perimeter
learningObjectives.description: Calculate area and perimeter of rectangles, triangles, parallelograms and trapezia

learningObjectives.title: Volume and surface area
learningObjectives.description: Calculate volume and surface area of prisms, cylinders, spheres and cones

learningObjectives.title: Arcs and sectors
learningObjectives.description: Calculate arc lengths and areas of sectors (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Pythagoras' theorem
learningObjectives.description: Use Pythagoras' theorem in 2D and 3D problems

learningObjectives.title: Trigonometry
learningObjectives.description: Use sin, cos and tan in right-angled triangles; exact trig values (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Sine and cosine rules
learningObjectives.description: Use sine rule, cosine rule and area formula ½ab sin C (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Vector notation and operations
learningObjectives.description: Describe translations as 2D vectors; add and subtract vectors (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Probability scale
learningObjectives.description: Record outcomes and calculate probabilities as fractions, decimals or percentages

learningObjectives.title: Mutually exclusive events
learningObjectives.description: Use the sum of probabilities for mutually exclusive events

learningObjectives.title: Sample space diagrams
learningObjectives.description: Use sample space diagrams, tables and tree diagrams

learningObjectives.title: Independent and conditional probability
learningObjectives.description: Calculate probabilities of independent and conditional events (Higher)

learningObjectives.title: Charts and diagrams
learningObjectives.description: Construct and interpret bar charts, pie charts, histograms and cumulative frequency graphs

learningObjectives.title: Scatter graphs
learningObjectives.description: Draw and interpret scatter graphs; describe correlation; line of best fit

learningObjectives.title: Averages and spread
learningObjectives.description: Calculate mean, median, mode and range; choose appropriate averages

learningObjectives.title: Grouped data
learningObjectives.description: Estimate mean and median from grouped data; compare distributions
